source_test: no direct HEC.FDA.ModelTest coverage for InterpolateQuantiles.cs (used internally by GraphicalFrequencyUncertaintyCalculators.LessSimpleMethod, exercised transitively via GraphicalFrequencyUncertaintyCalculatorsTests.cs); this case is original, gated only by the oracle_emitter (real C#).
notes: z-score normal-probability interpolation, no RNG. Reuses the same stage-frequency shape as the graphical_calculators.json cases (exceedance probabilities descending, values increasing) but calls InterpolateQuantiles.InterpolateOnX directly rather than through LessSimpleMethod.
